Rishabh Pant Sets Record as Gill Suffers Injury

Nov 15, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Rishabh Pant Sets Record as Gill Suffers Injury

India wicket-keeper-batter Rishabh Pant broke a major record in domestic/international cricket, just as his teammate Shubman Gill was ruled out with an injury — creating contrasting headlines for both.
